title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: Get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, push models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same API surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-community/llms/ollama
summary: First-class LangChain integration; use any Ollama model as an LLM or chat endpoint with LangChain abstractions.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (renamed to Open WebUI); chat history, model management, RAG, user auth.

title: ollama-cli (mattw/ollama-cli)
summary: Interactive TUI for Ollama written in Go; browse, chat, and switch models inside the terminal.

title: ollama-copilot (cmiller01/ollama-copilot)
summary: GitHub Copilot-like VS-Code extension that uses local Ollama models for inline suggestions.

title: ollama-rag (ggerganov/ollama-rag)
summary: Minimal RAG example using Ollama for embeddings + generation and llama-index for chunking.

title: ollama-agents (jmorganca/ollama-agents)
summary: Lightweight agent orchestration repo showing ReAct and multi-model tool use with Ollama.

title: ollama-docker-compose (awesome-ollama/ollama-docker)
summary: Ready-to-run Docker Compose stacks bundling Ollama, Open WebUI, Milvus, and RAG helpers.

title: ollama-npm (npm package)
summary: Official Ollama JavaScript SDK published on npm; 20k+ weekly downloads.

title: ollama (PyPI package)
summary: Official Python client on PyPI; install via pip and talk to local Ollama server.

title: ollama4j (ollama4j/ollama4j)
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; Android-compatible with Retrofit under the hood.

title: ollama-rs (pepperoni21/ollama-rs)
summary: Community Rust crate providing strongly-typed async bindings to the Ollama API.

title: ollama-csharp (awaescher/ollama-csharp)
summary: .NET client for Ollama supporting .NET 6+ with IAsyncEnumerable streaming.

title: ollama-helm (otw/ollama-helm)
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node-selector and autoscaling options.

title: ollama-haystack (deepset-ai/haystack-ollama)
summary: Haystack integration letting you use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-discord-bot (rizerphe/ollama-discord)
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that chats using any Ollama model with slash commands and context memory.

title: ollama-slack-bot (jameskim/ollama-slack)
summary: Lightweight Slack bot that listens in DMs or channels and replies via local Ollama models.

title: awesome-ollama (awesome-ollama/awesome-ollama)
summary: Curated list of libraries, tools, tutorials, and community projects in the Ollama ecosystem.
